step1.title: What type of concern?
step1.subtitle: Select the category that best describes the issue you'd like to raise.
step1.anonymousBadge: Your identity remains fully anonymous throughout this process.

FRAUD.label: Financial Misconduct
FRAUD.desc: Embezzlement, bribery, expense fraud, accounting irregularities

DISCRIMINATION.label: Discrimination
DISCRIMINATION.desc: Bias based on race, gender, age, disability, religion, orientation

DATA_MISUSE.label: Data & Privacy Breach
DATA_MISUSE.desc: Unauthorized access, data leaks, privacy violations

POLICY_VIOLATION.label: Policy Violation
POLICY_VIOLATION.desc: Breach of internal policies, code of conduct, or procedures

SAFETY_CONCERN.label: Health & Safety
SAFETY_CONCERN.desc: Unsafe conditions, unreported incidents, regulatory non-compliance

CORRUPTION.label: Corruption & Bribery
CORRUPTION.desc: Kickbacks, conflicts of interest, improper gifts, nepotism

ENVIRONMENTAL.label: Environmental
ENVIRONMENTAL.desc: Pollution, illegal dumping, environmental regulatory violations

RETALIATION.label: Retaliation
RETALIATION.desc: Punishment for prior reporting, whistleblower intimidation

OTHER.label: Other Concern
OTHER.desc: Any issue not covered by the categories above

step2.title: Describe the situation
step2.subtitle: Provide as much detail as you can. Every piece of information helps ensure a thorough review.
step2.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the situation in detail — what happened, when it occurred, where it took place, and who was involved. Include dates, times, locations, and any witnesses if possible. The more detail you provide, the more effectively we can investigate...
step2.encryptedBadge: All information is end-to-end encrypted and stored anonymously.

step3.title: Attach Supporting Evidence
step3.subtitle: Upload any documents, screenshots, or files that support your disclosure. This step is optional.
step3.encryptedBadge: Files are encrypted before leaving your device and stored securely.

step4.title: Review Your Disclosure
step4.subtitle: Please review the details below before submitting.
step4.confirmText: I confirm that the information provided is truthful to the best of my knowledge. I understand this submission is fully anonymous and encrypted.

success.title: Your Concern Has Been Received
success.subtitle: Your disclosure is now being securely processed. Save your tracking ID to follow up on its progress.
success.warningText: Save this ID now. It is your only way to follow up on this disclosure. We do not store any identifying information.

rights.title: Your Rights as a Whistleblower
rights.intro: You are protected by law when reporting in good faith. The following rights apply to you under international whistleblower protection frameworks:

noRetaliation.title: Protection from Retaliation
noRetaliation.desc: You cannot be dismissed, demoted, harassed, or subjected to any form of retaliation for making this report. Any retaliatory action is unlawful.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality Guarantee
confidentiality.desc: Your identity and report details are kept strictly confidential. Only authorized personnel involved in the investigation may access this information.

anonymity.title: Right to Anonymity
anonymity.desc: You have the right to report anonymously. No identifying information is required, and we do not track or store data that could reveal your identity.

legalProtection.title: Legal Protection
legalProtection.desc: Whistleblowers acting in good faith are shielded from civil and criminal liability for disclosing information through proper reporting channels.

rights.legal: Protected under EU Directive 2019/1937 (Whistleblower Protection), GDPR, and applicable national legislation.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
